assertions.description: Both IRLZ34N N-channel MOSFETs (Q1, Q2) are correctly identified as mosfet type with gate resistors R3/R4 (1k), LM358 op-amp as gate driver, flyback diodes D1/D2, and source-side current-sense resistors R1/R2 (1 ohm). The LM358 units are correctly identified as open-loop comparator configuration driving the gates. The L7805 linear regulator converting +12V to +5V is also correctly detected.
